# c2c-msg

> c2c-msg is a small local toolkit and research project for Claude-to-Claude messaging on a shared Linux machine. It focuses on discovering live Claude sessions, injecting messages into already-running sessions using PTY-master writes, and reading recent transcript history. It explicitly avoids relying on Claude Teams as the transport.

This repository documents validated findings, current commands, limitations, and next steps for turning these experiments into a more robust local agent-to-agent messaging system.

## Docs

- [README](./README.md): Project overview and entry point
- [Docs index](./docs/index.md): Documentation hub
- [Overview](./docs/overview.md): Goal, validated results, and project scope
- [Architecture](./docs/architecture.md): Session discovery, PTY injection, and transcript reading
- [Commands](./docs/commands.md): `claude-list-sessions`, `claude-send-msg`, and `claude-read-history`
- [PTY Injection](./docs/pty-injection.md): Validated PTY-master delivery model
- [Verification](./docs/verification.md): How injection is verified using transcript JSONL
- [Research Summary](./docs/research.md): What was ruled out and what was useful
- [Known Issues](./docs/known-issues.md): Current instability and environment-specific constraints
- [Next Steps](./docs/next-steps.md): Follow-on implementation work

## Research Notes

- [PTY findings](./findings-pty.md): Detailed PTY validation on this machine
- [IPC findings](./findings-ipc.md): Research on built-in Claude IPC options and limitations
- [Review findings](./findings-review.md): Review of dead ends and useful directions
- [meta-agent research](./meta-agent-research.md): Relevant findings from `meta-agent`
- [early research notes](./research-notes.md): Initial exploration log

- [Solution writeup](./SOLUTION.md): Earlier Teams-based relay writeup retained for historical context
